problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: Combining Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
